text.title: product-led-growth Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for product-led-growth as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running PLG optimization on a pre-PMF product with insufficient retention signal.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PLG amplifies a working loop; on a broken product it industrialises churn. Establish product-market fit before instrumenting the PLG funnel.

failure-mode.description: AI onboarding personalization attempting to reference user behavior data before any events have been captured (cold start in first 60 seconds).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Enforce a "no behavioural reference before event N" rule. Cold-start personalization that references unavailable data produces error messages or hallucinated user attributes.

failure-mode.description: Privacy regimes (GDPR, India DPDP) restricting event tracking that PLG analytics depend on, with consent-mode gaps distorting funnels.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Instrument consent-mode handling before running PLG analytics. Funnels measured without accounting for consent gaps systematically under-count users in regulated markets.

failure-mode.description: "Freemium tax": free tier consumes infra cost but converts less than 2% — common when no usage-gated upgrade trigger exists.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a friction edge in the free tier, there is no upgrade trigger. The business model fails before the funnel optimization begins.

failure-mode.description: TTV measured by clicks, not value: vanity activation rates that don't predict retention.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Optimizing on the wrong metric produces wrong interventions. Define activation as a retention-predictive event sequence, not a click count.

failure-mode.description: One-size onboarding for distinct personas → low activation across all of them; segmentation is the unlock.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Personas have different value drivers. Single-tour designs lose to 3-tour designs almost every time.

failure-mode.description: Sales-assist gap: PQLs surface but no human follow-up motion → expansion revenue stalls at SMB ceiling.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PQLs without sales support don't convert to team/enterprise deals. Add sales-assist at the SMB-to-enterprise inflection point.

failure-mode.description: Agents over-fitting on small samples: calling a winner with fewer than 1k users per variant or fewer than 7 days of runtime.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Enforce the minimum exposure and runtime gates at the agent output layer, not just in the prompt. Agents will call winners on day 2 with 200 users per variant if not blocked.

failure-mode.description: LLMs inventing metrics ("engagement score 0-100") that have no source event in the analytics schema.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Constrain output to a known event vocabulary loaded from the analytics schema. Invented metrics cannot be tracked or validated.

failure-mode.description: Tour-builder agents adding steps rather than removing them, even when prompted to optimize onboarding.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Prompt explicitly with "subtract first" and a step-count budget. Monitor step-count delta as a guardrail metric alongside activation rate.

failure-mode.description: PQL scoring drift: static model becomes wrong as the product evolves but continues to be used without recalibration.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Schedule quarterly PQL model recalibration as a standing SDD task. Flag if the model has not been recalibrated in 90+ days.
